race.comment: YES DONALD YES (8) couldn't have been more impressive saluting by over eight lengths at his second race start and will have derived a stack of confidence from that dominant victory. Gets the services of gun hoop Maloney in the irons and should be right there at the business end. SIR WINNIE (3) is a consistent conveyance who has hit the top-four in all four career outings to date. Strips fitter second-up from the spell and can make his presence felt. HE'SGOTTHESAY (5) resumes here but has revved up for this with a recent trial placing and may run a big race while fresh. BIT OF GRUNT (4) has placed three of four over this course and distance and is usually thereabouts. One for the exotics players. DOUBLE WHAMMY (1) rounds out the selections.
